title: cnidoscolus angustidens subsp. calyculatus
intro: Cnidoscolus angustidens subsp. calyculatus, also known as calyculated buffalo gourd or calyculated chaya, is a plant species that belongs to the family Euphorbiaceae and is native to Mexico. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cnidoscolus angustidens subsp. calyculatus include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate pain, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and offer relief from various health issues.
